entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pest insect whose larvae were collected from field crops and wild hosts in the Indian subcontinent

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where H. armigera larvae were collected and insecticide resistance was studied

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: A country where H. armigera larvae were collected and insecticide resistance was studied

entities.name: PAKISTAN
entities.description: A country where H. armigera larvae were collected and insecticide resistance was studied

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The geographic region encompassing India, Nepal, and Pakistan

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A field crop infested by H. armigera and subject to high insecticide application

entities.name: PULSE
entities.description: A field crop infested by H. armigera and subject to high insecticide application

entities.name: LEGUME
entities.description: A field crop infested by H. armigera and subject to high insecticide application

entities.name: CYPERMETHRIN
entities.description: A pyrethroid insecticide applied to H. armigera larvae

entities.name: FENVALERATE
entities.description: A pyrethroid insecticide applied to H. armigera larvae

entities.name: ENDOSULFAN
entities.description: An insecticide applied to H. armigera larvae

entities.name: QUINALPHOS
entities.description: A phosphorothionate group organophosphate insecticide applied to H. armigera larvae

entities.name: MONOCROTOPHOS
entities.description: A phosphate group organophosphate insecticide applied to H. armigera larvae

entities.name: METHOMYL
entities.description: An insecticide applied to H. armigera larvae

entities.name: PYRETHROIDS
entities.description: A class of insecticides including cypermethrin and fenvalerate

entities.name: ORGANOPHOSPHATE
entities.description: A class of insecticides including quinalphos and monocrotophos

entities.name: CARBAMATE
entities.description: A class of insecticides to which H. armigera developed resistance

entities.name: PIPERONYL BUTOXIDE
entities.description: A metabolic synergist used to suppress pyrethroid resistance

entities.name: INSECTICIDE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of H. armigera populations to survive exposure to various insecticides

entities.name: CYPERMETHRIN RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance specifically to the insecticide cypermethrin

entities.name: FENVALERATE RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance specifically to the insecticide fenvalerate

entities.name: PYRETHROID RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to the pyrethroid class of insecticides

entities.name: ENDOSULFAN RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance specifically to the insecticide endosulfan

entities.name: QUINALPHOS RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance specifically to the insecticide quinalphos

entities.name: MONOCROTOPHOS RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance specifically to the insecticide monocrotophos

entities.name: NERVE-INSENSITIVITY RESISTANCE MECHANISM
entities.description: A resistance mechanism that is not suppressed by piperonyl butoxide

entities.name: SUPER-KDR TYPE MECHANISM
entities.description: A high order nerve-insensitivity resistance mechanism

entities.name: LOG DOSE PROBIT BIOASSAYS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine insecticide resistance levels

entities.name: TOPICAL APPLICATION
entities.description: The method of applying insecticides directly to the surface of larvae

entities.name: MIXED FUNCTION OXIDASE COMPLEX
entities.description: An inherited or inducible enzyme complex attributed to resistance against pyrethroids, organophosphates, and carbamates

entities.name: INSECTICIDE SELECTION PRESSURE
entities.description: The pressure exerted by frequent insecticide use that selects for resistant individuals in a population
